title: Prototype CDK stack: add S3 Vectors alongside OpenSearch resources
description: Update prototype CDK stack to provision S3 Vectors (vector bucket + index) while retaining existing OpenSearch domain resources. Keep embeddings cache bucket and expose outputs for both stores.

comments.text: Starting Task 1. Next steps: update CDK stack resources from OpenSearch to S3 Vectors, update deploy script/docs, synth-check stack outputs.
